diagrams.title: Video Conferencing System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the components and data flow in a typical video conferencing setup
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how video and audio are captured, transmitted, and displayed in real-time

diagrams.title: Carbon Emission Comparison: Travel vs Video Conference
diagrams.description: Bar chart comparing carbon emissions between business travel and video conferencing for equivalent meetings
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the significant environmental benefit of video conferencing over traditional travel

diagrams.title: Cost Breakdown: Business Travel Expenses
diagrams.description: Pie chart showing various cost components of traditional business travel that can be saved
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the financial benefits and potential savings from adopting video conferencing

diagrams.title: Green IT Framework for Video Conferencing
diagrams.description: Framework showing how video conferencing fits into broader Green IT and sustainability strategies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the role of video conferencing in organizational sustainability initiatives
